channel.title: Techmeme
channel.description: Top news and commentary for technology's leaders, from all around the web

item.title: A look at the CSOP SK Hynix Leveraged ETF, which trades in Hong Kong and has ballooned into a $13B fund (Bloomberg)
item.description:
Bloomberg:
A look at the CSOP SK Hynix Leveraged ETF, which trades in Hong Kong and has ballooned into a $13B fund  —  A Hong Kong fund tied to SK Hynix has grown so large that it's beginning to move the stock it was built to track.

item.title: A survey of US adults finds 56% support banning social media for under-16s, while 21% oppose (Pew Research Center)
item.description:
Pew Research Center:
A survey of US adults finds 56% support banning social media for under-16s, while 21% oppose

item.title: CarbonSix, which is developing AI automation for manufacturing, raised a $40M Series A (FinSMEs)
item.description:
FinSMEs:
CarbonSix, which is developing AI automation for manufacturing, raised a $40M Series A  —  CarbonSix, Inc., a San Francisco, CA-based Physical AI company, raised $40m in Series A funding.

item.title: Duplicate of the ETF story that should be deduped (Bloomberg)
Item without external link should be skipped
